subject: Re: Bill McComb Invoice
body:
yes

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

> Bill McComb has forward to me an invoice for his
> services and those of  
> consultants he retained for the period January 1
> through October  31 mostly in 
> connection with the ACOE response, but also on
> various  other questions posed to 
> Bill from time to time during that period.  The 
> total amount billed is 
> $16,299.37 which covers the following:
>  
> McComb's  Fee                               
> $9,312.50        for  74.5 hours 
> of work at $125/hr    
> David Grigg (McComb's assistant)      $6,225        
>    for  62.25 hours of 
> work at $100/hr
> Gary Ray Field Ecology  Report         $500
> Dennis Rennis (Wetland Specialist)   $200
> Printing                                           
> $48.22
> Express  Mail                                   
> $13.65
>  
> Total                                               
> $16,299.37
> less  Retainer                                   
> ($5,000)
>  
> Total Requested to be Paid to McComb $11,299.37
>  
> Although time descriptions by McComb and Grigg are
> somewhat vague  and time 
> accounting seems a little loose (e.g., a number of
> entries for exactly  1 hour, 
> which is unlikely), overall bills for the work put
> in do not seem  
> unreasonable.
>  
> Jeffrey, do I have your permission to send McComb 
> $11,299.37?
>  
> Please advise.
> 



		
__________________________________

body_html:
yes

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

Bill McComb has forward to me an invoice for his
services and those of
consultants he retained for the period January 1
through October 31 mostly in
connection with the ACOE response, but also on
various other questions posed to
Bill from time to time during that period. The
total amount billed is
$16,299.37 which covers the following:

McComb's Fee
$9,312.50 for 74.5 hours
of work at $125/hr
David Grigg (McComb's assistant) $6,225
for 62.25 hours of
work at $100/hr
Gary Ray Field Ecology Report $500
Dennis Rennis (Wetland Specialist) $200
Printing
$48.22
Express Mail
$13.65

Total
$16,299.37
less Retainer
($5,000)

Total Requested to be Paid to McComb $11,299.37

Although time descriptions by McComb and Grigg are
somewhat vague and time
accounting seems a little loose (e.g., a number of
entries for exactly 1 hour,
which is unlikely), overall bills for the work put
in do not seem
unreasonable.

Jeffrey, do I have your permission to send McComb
$11,299.37?

Please advise.
